displayTitle: Meter It, Shim It, Tube It
kicker: MT LEVEL I // LIGHT, FIELD & CONSUMABLES

beats.narration: Magnetize the part perfectly and you can still miss the crack — in magnetic particle testing, the last link is light.

payload.title: THE LAST LINK
payload.sub: Light, field, and bath — prove all three before you inspect.

beats.narration: Three numbers rule the light — a hundred footcandles for visible, a thousand microwatts of U V A, ambient two or less. Verified with meters.
Amperage proves current flowed — not the field. Tape a Q Q I shim flaw-side to the part: a crisp bloom means the field is right.

payload.heading: Prove the field, not the amperage

beats.narration: The bath is a consumable: pull a sample, settle it thirty minutes, read the tube. Lean baths whisper; rich baths bury indications in background.

payload.heading: Check the bath with a tube

beats.narration: The shift-start ritual: meter the light, shim the field, tube the bath. Three habits that make everything you find afterward mean something.

payload.sub: Three shift-start habits — your procedure sets the numbers.
